sourceRootLabel: AgenC WP-02 checklist and app-server JSON-RPC protocol contract

requiredBehaviors.behavior: Portal daemon connections open a browser WebSocket to the selected local or remote endpoint and send initialize as the first JSON-RPC request with the daemon protocol version, portal capability flags, and an explicit daemon auth cookie when provided.
edgeCases: rejects non-websocket URLs before opening a socket
rejects credential-bearing URLs before opening a socket
rejects pending requests when the socket closes before a response
times out when a websocket never opens
rejects requests after a websocket error

requiredBehaviors.behavior: Foreground agenc daemon starts a real WebSocket JSON-RPC listener on the portal default endpoint family, shares the existing dispatcher with the Unix socket transport, enforces cookie-authenticated initialize, and allows trusted browser origins.
edgeCases: test hosts can bind the daemon websocket listener to an ephemeral port
untrusted browser origins are rejected at upgrade
missing daemon auth cookies reject initialize and close the websocket
valid daemon auth cookies allow initialize followed by health.ready

requiredBehaviors.behavior: After initialize succeeds, the portal reads health.ready, health.stats, auth.whoami, session.list, and agent.list to build the dashboard snapshot.
edgeCases: auth.whoami failure does not break the connected dashboard
closed daemon sessions normalize to the portal stopped status
errored daemon agents normalize to the portal failed status

requiredBehaviors.behavior: The first screen exposes local and remote endpoint controls, connect, refresh, disconnect, and explicit connection states without rendering daemon data through HTML injection.
edgeCases: hostile daemon strings are rendered as text content
refresh is disabled until a connection is initialized
mobile layout collapses endpoint controls into one column

requiredBehaviors.behavior: After integrating main's dynamic-import guard, WP-02 carries the required cleanup that replaces production dynamic mirror imports with static references and tightens the upstream-reference growth checker so baseline comparisons include the old lazy references.
edgeCases: production code contains no dynamic imports or requires of runtime/src/agenc/upstream
the upstream-reference checker counts static imports, dynamic imports, requires, type import paths, and the existing string-array join pattern
the candidate does not increase the production upstream-reference file count

intentionalReductions: WP-02 does not create or deploy a hosted portal backend; remote endpoints are operator-provided WebSocket targets.
Portal authentication actions are limited to auth.whoami for dashboard context. Authenticated mutations are owned by later WP items.
The portal repo stays dependency-light and uses the browser WebSocket API directly instead of adding a client framework or transport package.

mergeResolutions.context: main integrated Gate 3.6 while WP-02 was in progress
mergeResolutions.resolution: Kept main's guard and updated production code plus the upstream-reference growth checker to satisfy the new gate without increasing upstream references.
